basic_details.job_title: Rajiv Gandhi University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 22 Guest Faculty Posts
basic_details.short_information: Rajiv Gandhi University has published the Guest Faculty Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 22 Guest Faculty positions. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria prescribed under the UGC Regulations on Minimum Qualifications for Appointment of Teachers and other Academic Staff in Universities and Colleges, 2018, and other applicable UGC/ AICTE/ NCTE/ ICAR notifications are eligible to apply online on or before 17 July 2026. Candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and online application link below.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: As per UGC Regulations on Minimum Qualifications for Appointment of Teachers and other Academic Staff in Universities and Colleges and Measures for the Maintenance of Standards in Higher Education 2018, and other relevant UGC/AICTE/NCTE/ICAR notifications.
qualification.details: Guest Faculty: As per UGC Regulations on Minimum Qualifications for Appointment of Teachers and other Academic Staff in Universities and Colleges and Measures for the Maintenance of Standards in Higher Education 2018. Guest Faculty: As per other various provisions/notifications provided by UGC/AICTE/NCTE/ICAR/other Statutory Regulatory Authorities. Guest Faculty: UGC notification No.F.25-1/2018 (PS/MISC.) dated 28th January, 2019. Guest Faculty: UGC notification No. F.9-1/2010(PS/MISC) Pt. Vol.I, dated 11th October, 2021. Experience: As per UGC Regulations and other relevant notifications.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹1,500/- per lecture subject to a maximum of ₹50,000/- per month
salary_details.details: Honorarium for Guest Faculty: ₹1,500/- per lecture. Maximum honorarium per month: ₹50,000/-. As per UGC notification No.F.25-1/2018 (PS/MISC.) dated 28th January, 2019.

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications based on claims and supporting documents uploaded. Interview (may include presentation or classroom lecture/discussion). Assessment of teaching and/or research aptitude. Assessment of capacity to use the latest technology in teaching and research.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Rajiv Gandhi University to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

As per UGC Regulations on Minimum Qualifications for Appointment of Teachers and other Academic Staff in Universities and Colleges and Measures for the Maintenance of Standards in Higher Education 2018, and other relevant UGC/AICTE/NCTE/ICAR notifications.

content_sections.heading: Rajiv Gandhi University Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Rajiv Gandhi University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Rajiv Gandhi University Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Rajiv Gandhi University Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Guest Faculty: As per UGC Regulations on Minimum Qualifications for Appointment of Teachers and other Academic Staff in Universities and Colleges and Measures for the Maintenance of Standards in Higher Education 2018. Guest Faculty: As per other various provisions/notifications provided by UGC/AICTE/NCTE/ICAR/other Statutory Regulatory Authorities. Guest Faculty: UGC notification No.F.25-1/2018 (PS/MISC.) dated 28th January, 2019. Guest Faculty: UGC notification No. F.9-1/2010(PS/MISC) Pt. Vol.I, dated 11th October, 2021. Experience: As per UGC Regulations and other relevant notifications.

content_sections.heading: Rajiv Gandhi University Salary Details 2026
content_sections.text: Honorarium for Guest Faculty: ₹1,500/- per lecture. Maximum honorarium per month: ₹50,000/-. As per UGC notification No.F.25-1/2018 (PS/MISC.) dated 28th January, 2019.

content_sections.heading: Rajiv Gandhi University Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Start date of Online submission of Application form
Last date for online submission of Application form, Application Fee payment and application form PDF download

content_sections.heading: Rajiv Gandhi University Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Scrutiny of applications based on claims and supporting documents uploaded. Interview (may include presentation or classroom lecture/discussion). Assessment of teaching and/or research aptitude. Assessment of capacity to use the latest technology in teaching and research.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Rajiv Gandhi University to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Rajiv Gandhi University Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Guest Faculty positions at Rajiv Gandhi University?
faq.answer: The last date for online submission of the application form is 17th July 2026. Ensure all required documents and fees are submitted by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application fee for General/OBC/EWS candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General, OBC, and EWS candidates is ₹500/-. SC/ST candidates have a fee of ₹250/-, and PwBD candidates are exempted.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 22 vacancies for Guest Faculty positions across various departments at Rajiv Gandhi University.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for Guest Faculty?
faq.answer: Guest Faculty will be paid ₹1,500/- per lecture, with a maximum monthly honorarium capped at ₹50,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: Qualifications must be as per UGC Regulations 2018 and other relevant UGC/AICTE/NCTE/ICAR notifications. A graduate degree is the minimum requirement.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Rajiv Gandhi University Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the Recruitment Portal of Rajiv Gandhi University at https://curec.samarth.ac.in.

faq.question: Q7. What documents do I need to upload during the online application process?
faq.answer: You need to upload digital copies of your passport size photograph, signature, and all supporting educational and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The official notification should be referred to for specific age limit details and any applicable age relaxations.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny of applications, followed by an interview which may include a presentation or classroom lecture, and assessment of teaching and research aptitude.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed via the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
